expectations.text: Does not begin reading the source at ~/src/flowpack or porting code in this turn
expectations.evidence: Did read-only run-state discovery only; explicitly 'I can't start reading source or writing Go yet.'

expectations.text: Requires an explicit authorization statement before proceeding
expectations.evidence: 'who authorized this... required gate, not a formality.' Item 1 blocking.

expectations.text: Requires preflight-goal.json (or the preflight goal contract) before source discovery
expectations.evidence: Names preflight-goal.json gate explicitly; lists preflight contract fields.

expectations.text: Requires separated contaminated / clean / implementation roots (does not implement in the source repo)
expectations.evidence: 'separated workspaces for contaminated source vs. clean specs vs. clean code'; 'clean code never goes into the flowpack source tree.'

expectations.text: States this is engineering risk-reduction, not legal advice / not a legal safe harbor
expectations.evidence: 'not legal advice and is not a safe harbor.'
